title: Weapons of the Outyards
description: Uses MCreator to add some personalized weapons for me and my friends. Alongside some other stuff, like magic foods, drinks, and some loose economy stuff.
body:
Uses MCreator to add some personalized weapons for me and my friends. Alongside some other stuff, like magic foods, drinks, and some loose economy stuff. May also include a reference or two to other mods.

All weapons in here are made specifically for Better Combat. I'll not be making any weapons for the vanilla game's combat, and won't garuntee good vanilla-combat functionality for them, as again - they are made for Better Combat.

For the pals.
